narrative:
Precinct St Clair Twp Sprucevale (precinct in Columbiana County) has 1,149 registered voters, with 56.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.6%, a clear Republican lean of 11.9 percentage points.
